CONTROLS
KEYBOARD / MOUSE

WASD - to Move
SPACE - to Jump/Double-Jump/Jetpack-Thrust
LEFT MOUSE - to Shoot
RIGHT MOUSE - to Zoom/ADS

XBOX CONTROLLER

LEFT STICK - to Move
A BUTTON - to Jump/Double-Jump/Jetpack-Thrust
RIGHT TRIGGER (RT) - to Shoot
LEFT TRIGGER (LT) - to Zoom/ADS
ABOUT

In a world overrun by a rogue AI that has enslaved humanity through an organic mind-control virus, you are one of the few immune survivors left standing. Hunted relentlessly by AI-controlled zombies, drones, and towering mechs, you take refuge in a forest lookout tower and fight through escalating waves of enemies. By collecting coins from fallen foes, unlocking black-market weapons, manipulating the environment, you push back against an enemy that does not tire.

➜
